label: Transparent coyote motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Coyote transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated coyote profile motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A single adult coyote in clean side profile, alert but calm posture, accurate anatomy, lean silhouette, pointed ears, long muzzle, expressive amber eye, layered tan grey rust and sage-shadow fur, subtle chaparral dust tones, crisp fur texture but simplified enough for a catalog motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full head, neck, shoulders, tail hint if visible, no crop; profile facing right.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves tan-grey fur, rust markings, pale throat, sage reflected shadows, and crisp silhouette edges.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second animal, no dog collar, no moon, no desert scene, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Coyote light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Coyote" / "Coyote Profile", derived from an isolated right-facing coyote profile motif with tan, grey, rust, sage, and chaparral field colors.
Reference use: The board must visibly respect the coyote motif: lean profile silhouette, pointed-ear geometry, layered fur bands, pale throat highlights, rust muzzle/ear markings, grey guard hairs, sage chaparral shadows, and adaptive field-system pragmatism.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source asset.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide; large readable labels, avoid dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Coyote", motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, sample usage, generated asset examples.
Typography: English guidance using Inter/Geist-like product UI with condensed field labels; Japanese guidance using Noto Sans JP / BIZ UDPGothic, balanced kana rhythm, readable dashboard numerals, no decorative display fonts.
UI language: quiet adaptive field system for operations dashboards, compact cards, side navigation, segmented controls, search command, data filters, alert/status chips, forms, checkboxes, radio buttons, switches, tabs, badges, tables, empty/loading/error states, chart panels, map/list hybrid preview.
Color palette: use only motif-derived and chaparral colors: Coyote Sand #d7b27a, Guard Hair Grey #8a877d, Rust Ear #b7653b, Sage Scrub #7f8d72, Pale Throat #f1e6d2, Track Ink #2d2923, Dust Field #efe3cf, Dry Creek #6a5748, Night Ridge #1f211d.
Visual details: 8px radius cards, crisp hairline borders, small triangular ear markers, subtle fur-strand texture, track-like chart markers, restrained rust primary actions, sage focus rings, high-contrast readable foreground.
Text: short readable UI labels in English and Japanese; include headings like Palette, Type, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tokens.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no neon colors, no cartoon mascot, no random logos, no watermark, no unrelated animal, no desert cliche scene, no illegible tiny paragraphs.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Coyote dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Coyote" / "Coyote Profile". It must feel like the same adaptive field system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the same right-facing coyote profile motif language: lean silhouette, pointed-ear geometry, layered tan-grey fur bands, pale throat highlights, rust muzzle/ear markings, sage chaparral shadows, track markers, and compact operational dashboard rhythm.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source asset.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution, at least 2400px wide; large readable labels, avoid dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Coyote", Dark Mode, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, sample usage, generated asset examples.
Typography: English guidance using Inter/Geist-like product UI with condensed field labels; Japanese guidance using Noto Sans JP / BIZ UDPGothic, balanced kana rhythm, readable dashboard numerals, no decorative display fonts.
UI language: quiet adaptive field system for night operations dashboards, compact cards, side navigation, segmented controls, search command, data filters, alert/status chips, forms, checkboxes, radio buttons, switches, tabs, badges, tables, empty/loading/error states, chart panels, map/list hybrid preview.
Color palette: dark mode derived from motif colors: Night Ridge #1f211d, Track Ink #2d2923, Dry Creek #6a5748, Guard Hair Grey #8a877d, Coyote Sand #d7b27a, Rust Ear #b7653b, Sage Scrub #7f8d72, Pale Throat #f1e6d2, Dust Field #efe3cf.
Visual details: deep olive-brown background, warm pale text, rust primary actions, sage focus rings, muted tan panels, subtle fur-strand texture overlays, track-like chart markers, crisp hairline borders, 8px radius cards, restrained contrast.
Text: short readable UI labels in English and Japanese; include headings like Palette, Type, Components, Navigation, Data, Forms, Tokens.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no cartoon mascot, no random logos, no watermark, no unrelated animal, no illegible tiny paragraphs.
